text: As I stand in this clean, modern hallway, passing through glass doors into a vibrant exhibition space marked 'R+D,' I feel an invigorating blend of curiosity and harmony. The wall text encourages me to contemplate our relationship with constructed spaces and nature. There’s a sense of purpose and innovation, yet an underlying calm acceptance. I’m inspired to linger, reflect, and perhaps to connect with the energies of research and development that this environment celebrates.
